remaining_tasks.name: Diagnose and fix 502 Bad Gateway on access

blockers.description: Site returns 502 Bad Gateway after successful deploy

decisions.decision: Force NODE_ENV=development in Dockerfile during npm ci
decisions.rationale: Coolify sets NODE_ENV=production globally which skips devDependencies required for Next.js build

next_action: Investigate Coolify app logs or Traefik proxy logs for the 502 Bad Gateway.
context_notes: The container builds and starts successfully (listening on 0.0.0.0:3000). The FQDN pecae.italohub.cloud was added. However, Traefik returns 502.
